conclusion: MBA TranAD data has identical train/test. A2P F1=43.1% is an in-sample evaluation, not out-of-sample. With 70/30 temporal split, F1=12.66% (3.4x lower). The paper's 67.55% uses PhysioNet SVDB records with proper temporal separation. This explains most of the 48pp gap between our replication and the paper.
